# referencedElement

**Instance Property**

The element that the coordinate is based on, either directly or through the coordinate from which it was derived.

## Declaration

```swift
var referencedElement: XCUIElement { get }
```

## Getting coordinate properties

- **screenPoint**: The dynamically computed value of the coordinate’s location on screen.

items.description: The dynamically computed value of the coordinate’s location on screen.
items.name: screenPoint
